elements.title: a drummer who had to play one handed
elements.contents: ... that the Pogues once had a drummer who had to play one handed (pictured) while recovering from blood poisoning?

elements.title: Colección de Lenguas Indígenas
elements.contents: ... that the Colección de Lenguas Indígenas includes the only written records of three languages that have since died out?

elements.title: Alfonso Quiñónez Molina
elements.contents: ... that Alfonso Quiñónez Molina suddenly becoming President of El Salvador before the 1919 election was described as a "mixed blessing"?

elements.title: estate of Jeffrey Epstein
elements.contents: ... that the estate of Jeffrey Epstein has lost up to 80 percent of its estimated monetary value since 2019?

elements.title: Jerauld George Wright
elements.contents: ... that Jerauld George Wright was awarded the Distinguished Flying Cross for his "brilliant" navigation during a 2,000-mile (3,200 km) overwater flight that lasted almost 25 hours?

elements.title: Archion
elements.contents: ... that the Japanese truckmakers Hino and Fuso are merging into Archion following an emissions-fraud scandal that caused a delay of more than one year?

elements.title: Crystal Z Campbell
elements.contents: ... that Go-Rilla Means War by Crystal Z Campbell was inspired by a kung fu judge?

elements.title: an episode of Ted
elements.contents: ... that a scene from an episode of Ted took about 30 takes to complete due to Scott Grimes repeatedly making his co-stars laugh?

elements.title: John Comfort Fillmore
elements.contents: ... that John Comfort Fillmore perceived a "cosmic connection" between the music of Native Americans and music composed by Richard Wagner?
